entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological oxidation of ammonia resulting in the transformation of NH4+ into NO3-

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: A relatively immobile form of nitrogen (NH4+)

entities.name: NITRATE
entities.description: A highly mobile form of nitrogen (NO3-) vulnerable to leaching and denitrification

entities.name: LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of nitrate from the soil system

entities.name: DENITRIFICATION
entities.description: The loss of nitrogen through the process of denitrification

entities.name: NITROGEN-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which nitrogen is utilized in agricultural systems

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITRIFICATION INHIBITION
entities.description: The ability of certain plants to suppress soil nitrifier function by releasing inhibitors from roots

entities.name: NITROSOMONAS EUROPAEA
entities.description: A bacterium used in a recombinant luminescent form to develop a BNI assay

entities.name: BNI ASSAY
entities.description: An assay developed using recombinant luminescent Nitrosomonas europaea to detect and quantify BNI activity

entities.name: BNI ACTIVITY
entities.description: The inhibitory effects in plant soil systems, expressed in ATU

entities.name: ATU
entities.description: Allylthiourea unit, the unit used to express BNI activity

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The plant species studied for its biological nitrification inhibition potential

entities.name: ROOT EXUDATES
entities.description: Substances released by sorghum roots into a water-based medium

entities.name: BNI CAPACITY
entities.description: The BNI activity per gram of root dry weight per day

entities.name: GROWTH STAGE
entities.description: The developmental stage of the plant which affects BNI capacity

entities.name: HYDROPHOBIC COMPOUNDS
entities.description: Compounds released by sorghum roots that are recoverable by dichloromethane wash

entities.name: DICHLOROMETHANE WASH
entities.description: The process of washing roots with dichloromethane to recover hydrophobic compounds

entities.name: HPLC FRACTIONATION
entities.description: Activity-guided high-performance liquid chromatography used to isolate active constituents

entities.name: FLAVONOID
entities.description: A class of plant secondary metabolites to which sakuranetin belongs

entities.name: SAKURANETIN
entities.description: A flavonoid identified as an active constituent with BNI activity in root exudates

entities.name: SORGOLEONE
entities.description: An active constituent with BNI activity isolated from DCM-root wash

entities.name: NITROSOMONAS ACTIVITY
entities.description: The biological activity of Nitrosomonas bacteria inhibited by BNI compounds

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The differences in sorgoleone production capacity among sorghum genotypes

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The natural environment where wild-sorghum species showed high-BNI capacity

entities.name: NITROGEN FOOTPRINT
entities.description: The total nitrogen loss and environmental impact from agricultural systems
